heading: Determinations and points of order
label: 938 Determinations and points of order
text: Nothing in this chapter shall be construed as limiting the authority of the chairmen of the Committees on the Budget of the House and Senate under . CBO may consult with the Chairmen of the House and Senate Budget Committees to resolve any ambiguities in this chapter.section 643 of this title
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 111–139124 Stat. 8section 931 of this titleFeb. 12, 2010
